name: Pillsbury Corn Dog Twists
recipeIngredient: 1 11.5 oz can Pillsbury Cornbread Mix (16 ct)
recipeInstructions:
1. Securely insert a wooden stick into each hot dog.
2. Unroll the dough into one long sheet and seal the center perforations.
3. Separate the dough into 8 long strips (2 twists each).
4. Wrap each long strip around a hot dog, placing it on an ungreased cookie sheet with the ends of the dough tucked under the hot dog.
5. Brush the dough with melted margarine and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 16 minutes or until the Cornbread Twists are light golden brown. Makes 8 Corn Dog Twists.
These are on my "to try" list...just up my kids alley...
